title: Mineable Trial Spawner & Vault
description: This mod makes Trial Spawners and Vaults mineable with Silk Touch.
body:
# Mineable Trial Spawner & Vault
**allows Trial Spawners and Vaults to be safely mined.**

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-JOIN-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/6NJZSxXFPV) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-SUPPORT-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/bobotweaks) [![Fiverr](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fiverr-HIRE%20ME-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=fiverr&logoColor=white)](https://www.fiverr.com/s/1qZlPl6)

![trial-spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PgHqGO4D/images/2448c441028d6db7058142cf8990b6bc1ee5173e.gif)

### Trial Spawners
- **Trial Spawners** drop their contained **Spawn Egg** when broken (even without **Silk Touch**)
- Using **Silk Touch** drops the **Trial Spawner** or **Vault block** itself
- **Egg Protection**: Prevents using the same Spawn Egg twice and drops the old egg when swapping types.
- **Deactivation**: Placing 4 torches on the sides of a Trial Spawner deactivates it (triggers a 10s cooldown).
- **Cooldowns**: Remaining cooldown time is saved to the spawner item and resumed when placed.

### Vaults
- **Ominous Vaults** drop as **“Ominous Vault”** and stay ominous when placed
- Normal **Vaults** drop and place normally

Perfect for builders, map makers, and automation setups.

![ominous vault](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PgHqGO4D/images/e475b0a035f348323202398c4cbe82b3a6b48e39.gif)
